'''鈭歯g-m-n''' ('''kangaman''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:necrose|necrose]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-m-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:necrose|necrose]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-m-n
|-
! Lemma
| kangaman
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingaman|thingaman]] || [[word:jingaman|jingaman]] || [[word:shingaman|shingaman]] || [[word:kingaman|kingaman]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungaman|thuthungaman]] || [[word:jujungaman|jujungaman]] || [[word:shushungaman|shushungaman]] || [[word:kukungaman|kukungaman]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungaman|thungaman]] || [[word:jungaman|jungaman]] || [[word:shungaman|shungaman]] || [[word:kungaman|kungaman]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungaman|thungaman]] || [[word:jungaman|jungaman]] || [[word:shungaman|shungaman]] || [[word:kungaman|kungaman]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengaman|thengaman]] || [[word:jengaman|jengaman]] || [[word:shengaman|shengaman]] || [[word:kengaman|kengaman]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongaman|thothongaman]] || [[word:jojongaman|jojongaman]] || [[word:shoshongaman|shoshongaman]] || [[word:kokongaman|kokongaman]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongaman|thongaman]] || [[word:jongaman|jongaman]] || [[word:shongaman|shongaman]] || [[word:kongaman|kongaman]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongaman|thongaman]] || [[word:jongaman|jongaman]] || [[word:shongaman|shongaman]] || [[word:kongaman|kongaman]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙ngaman|th忙ngaman]] || [[word:j忙ngaman|j忙ngaman]] || [[word:sh忙ngaman|sh忙ngaman]] || [[word:k忙ngaman|k忙ngaman]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangaman|thathangaman]] || [[word:jajangaman|jajangaman]] || [[word:shashangaman|shashangaman]] || [[word:kakangaman|kakangaman]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangaman|thangaman]] || [[word:jangaman|jangaman]] || [[word:shangaman|shangaman]] || [[word:kangaman|kangaman]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangaman|thangaman]] || [[word:jangaman|jangaman]] || [[word:shangaman|shangaman]] || [[word:kangaman|kangaman]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangaman|shangaman]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangaman|goshangaman]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangaman|gokishangaman]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangaman眉|shangaman眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangamankn眉|goshangamankn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangaman眉|gokishangaman眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangamansh毛|shangamansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangamanksh毛|goshangamanksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangamansh毛|gokishangamansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangamanro|shangamanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangamankro|goshangamankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangamanro|gokishangamanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangamanmu|shangamanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangamankmu|goshangamankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangamanmu|gokishangamanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangamansher|shangamansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangamanksher|goshangamanksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangamansher|gokishangamansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangamang|shangamang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangamankng|goshangamankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangamang|gokishangamang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangamanya|shangamanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangamankya|goshangamankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangamanya|gokishangamanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangamanyam|shangamanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangamankyam|goshangamankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangamanyam|gokishangamanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangaman眉sh毛|shangaman眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangamankn眉sh毛|goshangamankn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangaman眉sh毛|gokishangaman眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangaman眉ro|shangaman眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangamankn眉ro|goshangamankn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangaman眉ro|gokishangaman眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangaman眉mu|shangaman眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangamankn眉mu|goshangamankn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangaman眉mu|gokishangaman眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangamansh毛n眉|shangamansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangamanksh毛n眉|goshangamanksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangamansh毛n眉|gokishangamansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangamansh毛ro|shangamansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangamanksh毛ro|goshangamanksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangamansh毛ro|gokishangamansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangamansh毛mu|shangamansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangamanksh毛mu|goshangamanksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangamansh毛mu|gokishangamansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangamanron眉|shangamanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangamankron眉|goshangamankron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangamanron眉|gokishangamanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangamanrosh毛|shangamanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangamankrosh毛|goshangamankrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangamanrosh毛|gokishangamanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangamanromu|shangamanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangamankromu|goshangamankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangamanromu|gokishangamanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangamanmun眉|shangamanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangamankmun眉|goshangamankmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangamanmun眉|gokishangamanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangamanmush毛|shangamanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangamankmush毛|goshangamankmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangamanmush毛|gokishangamanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangamanmuro|shangamanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangamankmuro|goshangamankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangamanmuro|gokishangamanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
